title: RC26's Pack
description: This pack is specially made for pvp/faction servers.
body:
# RC26's Pack

This pack is specially made for pvp/faction servers.\
Please note that **1.21.5+ versions** of the pack **are planned** for when the updates will come out.

**This is a work in progress, reviews and suggestions are welcome!**

To report issues or make suggestions, contact me via my Discord : @redcarlos


##### If you were to use some of the textures in another pack, please give credit and provide a link to this Modrinth page.
